title: ⏳ Chaotic Time Recursion
name: ⏳ Chaotic Time Recursion
what_it_is: Time as a looping, recursive variable—not a straight line but a foldable, retellable fractal with chaotic pivots.
how_to_use: she lives in recursive time—past and future collapse into chaotic now
his shadow flickers through timeslices—each step echoes a million futures
animation_behavior: Motion rewinds and replays with variation, scenes loop and diverge, timelines overlap ---
